title: pelargonium × stewartii
intro: Pelargonium × stewartii, also known as the Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species in the Geraniaceae family, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium tomentosum. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a restful sleep. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
